testcase.name: test_default_n_folds
testcase.failure:
def test_default_n_folds(): """Test default n folds.""" check = PlaceboInTime() > assert check.n_folds == 3 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'PlaceboInTime' object has no attribute 'n_folds'
causalpy\tests\test_placebo_in_time.py:106: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_custom_n_folds
testcase.failure:
def test_custom_n_folds(): """Test custom n folds.""" check = PlaceboInTime(n_folds=5) > assert check.n_folds == 5 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'PlaceboInTime' object has no attribute 'n_folds'
causalpy\tests\test_placebo_in_time.py:112: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_expected_effect_prior_with_rope_ok
testcase.failure:
def test_expected_effect_prior_with_rope_ok(): """Test expected effect prior with rope ok.""" check = PlaceboInTime( expected_effect_prior=np.array([1.0, 2.0, 3.0]), rope_half_width=0.5, ) > assert check.rope_half_width == 0.5 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'PlaceboInTime' object has no attribute 'rope_half_width'
causalpy\tests\test_placebo_in_time.py:168: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_selection_method_default
testcase.failure:
def test_selection_method_default(): """Default selection method is sequential.""" check = PlaceboInTime() > assert check.selection_method == "sequential" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'PlaceboInTime' object has no attribute 'selection_method'
causalpy\tests\test_placebo_in_time.py:822: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_selection_method_random
testcase.failure:
def test_selection_method_random(): """Random selection mode stores parameters.""" check = PlaceboInTime( selection_method="random", min_training_pct=0.40, min_gap=2, exclude_periods={"2020-01"}, random_seed=99, ) > assert check.selection_method == "random" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'PlaceboInTime' object has no attribute 'selection_method'
causalpy\tests\test_placebo_in_time.py:834: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_allow_overlap_default_false
testcase.failure:
def test_allow_overlap_default_false(): """allow_overlap defaults to False (non-overlap enforced).""" check = PlaceboInTime(selection_method="random") > assert check.allow_overlap is False ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'PlaceboInTime' object has no attribute 'allow_overlap'
causalpy\tests\test_placebo_in_time.py:863: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_allow_overlap_stores_value
testcase.failure:
def test_allow_overlap_stores_value(): """allow_overlap=True is stored on the instance.""" check = PlaceboInTime(selection_method="random", allow_overlap=True) > assert check.allow_overlap is True ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'PlaceboInTime' object has no attribute 'allow_overlap'
causalpy\tests\test_placebo_in_time.py:869: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_compute_statistics_did_ols_missing_interaction_term

failure.message: AttributeError: property 'labels' of 'DifferenceInDifferences' object has no setter

testcase.failure:
mock_pymc_sample = None did_data = group t unit post_treatment y obs_ind 0 0 0.0 0 False 0.977736 1 0 1.0 0 True 2.132566 2 1 0.0 1 False 1.192903 3 1 1.0 1 True 2.816825 4 0 0.0 2 False 1.114538 5 0 1.0 2 True 2.058734 6 1 0.0 3 False 1.244856 7 1 1.0 3 True 2.565495 8 0 0.0 4 False 0.969278 9 0 1.0 4 True 1.998824 10 1 0.0 5 False 1.313544 11 1 1.0 5 True 2.761329 12 0 0.0 6 False 1.141880 13 0 1.0 6 True 2.079942 14 1 0.0 7 False 1.207242 15 1 1.0 7 True 2.903469 16 0 0.0 8 False 0.777264 17 0 1.0 8 True 2.028242 18 1 0.0 9 False 1.137845 19 1 1.0 9 True 2.880087 20 0 0.0 10 False 1.051274 21 0 1.0 10 True 1.893801 22 1 0.0 11 False 1.240177 23 1 1.0 11 True 2.788923 24 0 0.0 12 False 0.804464 25 0 1.0 12 True 2.033736 26 1 0.0 13 False 1.297743 27 1 1.0 13 True 2.639673 28 0 0.0 14 False 0.950129 29 0 1.0 14 True 2.091579 30 1 0.0 15 False 1.186775 31 1 1.0 15 True 2.802344 32 0 0.0 16 False 1.038269 33 0 1.0 16 True 2.017818 34 1 0.0 17 False 1.174418 35 1 1.0 17 True 2.667039 36 0 0.0 18 False 1.054596 37 0 1.0 18 True 2.129121 38 1 0.0 19 False 1.299681 39 1 1.0 19 True 2.626326
@pytest.mark.integration def test_compute_statistics_did_ols_missing_interaction_term( mock_pymc_sample, did_data ): """Test _compute_statistics_did_ols error when interaction term is not found.""" from sklearn.linear_model import LinearRegression
from causalpy.reporting import _compute_statistics_did_ols
df = did_data
# Create DiD result result = cp.DifferenceInDifferences( df, formula="y ~ 1 + group * post_treatment", time_variable_name="t", group_variable_name="group", model=LinearRegression(), )
# Manually corrupt the labels to trigger error > result.labels = ["Intercept", "some_other_term"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: property 'labels' of 'DifferenceInDifferences' object has no setter
causalpy\tests\test_reporting.py:1410: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_extract_counterfactual_dict_format

failure.message: AttributeError: property 'post_pred' of 'InterruptedTimeSeries' object has no setter

testcase.failure:
mock_pymc_sample = None its_data = year month t y causal effect intercept obs_ind 2010-01-31 2010 1 0 21.554716 0.000000 1.0 2010-02-28 2010 2 1 28.851317 0.000000 1.0 2010-03-31 2010 3 2 23.258060 0.000000 1.0 2010-04-30 2010 4 3 31.936498 0.000000 1.0 2010-05-31 2010 5 4 41.090762 0.000000 1.0 ... ... ... ... ... ... ... 2019-08-31 2019 8 115 77.993327 0.000251 1.0 2019-09-30 2019 9 116 65.161890 0.000123 1.0 2019-10-31 2019 10 117 56.770090 0.000060 1.0 2019-11-30 2019 11 118 55.833200 0.000029 1.0 2019-12-31 2019 12 119 44.623146 0.000014 1.0
[120 rows x 6 columns]
@pytest.mark.integration def test_extract_counterfactual_dict_format(mock_pymc_sample, its_data): """Test _extract_counterfactual with dict format PyMC results.""" from causalpy.reporting import _extract_counterfactual
df = its_data treatment_time = pd.to_datetime("2017-01-01") result = cp.InterruptedTimeSeries( df, treatment_time, formula="y ~ 1 + t + C(month)", model=cp.pymc_models.LinearRegression(sample_kwargs=sample_kwargs), )
# Convert InferenceData to dict format post_pred_dict = {"posterior_predictive": result.post_pred.posterior_predictive} original_post_pred = result.post_pred > result.post_pred = post_pred_dict ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: property 'post_pred' of 'InterruptedTimeSeries' object has no setter
causalpy\tests\test_reporting.py:1570: AttributeError
